redshiftserverless.workgroup.CfnAbout: The collection of compute resources in Amazon Redshift Serverless.

redshiftserverless.workgroup.BaseCapacit.Description: The base compute capacity of the workgroup in Redshift Processing Units (RPUs).

redshiftserverless.workgroup.ConfigParam.Description: A list of parameters to set for finer control over a database. Available options are `datestyle`, `enable_user_activity_logging`, `query_group`, `search_path`, and `max_query_execution_time`.

redshiftserverless.workgroup.EnhancedVpc.Description: The value that specifies whether to enable enhanced virtual private cloud (VPC) routing, which forces Amazon Redshift Serverless to route traffic through your VPC.

redshiftserverless.workgroup.NamespaceNa.Description: The namespace the workgroup is associated with.

redshiftserverless.workgroup.PubliclyAcc.Description: A value that specifies whether the workgroup can be accessible from a public network.

redshiftserverless.workgroup.SecurityGro.Description: A list of security group IDs to associate with the workgroup.

redshiftserverless.workgroup.SubnetIds.Description: A list of subnet IDs the workgroup is associated with.

redshiftserverless.workgroup.Tags.Description: The map of the key-value pairs used to tag the workgroup.
